title: Hypno's Infection Pack
description: A parasite-themed pack designed to create a challenging-but-rewarding experience!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e845da0c1145c184138214eecd0c34cbea6e01c.png)
### Hypno's Infection Pack is a modpack based around [Fight or Die: Mutations](https://modrinth.com/mod/WZ49g0N6) that adds a parasite mechanic to the world. It's difficult at first but becomes manageable as long as you adapt and stay vigilant. Many other features are also included for immersion and to make the experience more terrifying.


The mod works great in singleplayer, and should run fine on servers as long as a couple client mods are disabled; details below. The mod was designed with multiplayer in mind but there should be no differences running the game in singleplayer.

## Highly Recommended:
Install the [Insanity Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/insanity-shader) for best results! Comparison below:

![Shaders Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nVED8Vzq/images/7f23137f817efdf2bc12d0795ea241d4d8f87cb0.gif)

# For Server Owners:

<details>
<summary>Server Owner Information</summary>

Be sure to disable the following mods before starting your server:
- Blur (`blur-forge-X.X.X.jar`)
- True Darkness (`darkness-forge-X.X.X.jar`)
- Entity Model Features (`entity_model_features_forge_X.X.X.jar`)
- Entity Texture Features (`entity_texture_features_forge_X.X.X.jar`)
- Oculus (`Oculus-mcX.X.X.jar`)
- ItemPhysicLite (`ItemPhysicLite_FORGE_vX.X.X.jar`)
- EnhancedVisuals (`EnhancedVisuals_FORGE_vX.X.X.jar`)
- EMI Loot (`emi-loot-X.X.X.jar`)

If you're using [itzg/docker-minecraft-server](https://github.com/itzg/docker-minecraft-server), your config should look something like this:
```yaml
  MODRINTH_EXCLUDE_FILES: |
    blur
    darkness
    entity_model
    entity_texture
    oculus
    itemphysiclite
    enhancedvisuals
    emi_loot
```

</details>



# Features

Enchant a helmet with Night Vision to see clearly without a light source at night!

![Night Vision GIF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nVED8Vzq/images/d85ce705722280f91493a9aad46d9476eaca985d.gif)

Tree Felling

![Tree Felling GIF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nVED8Vzq/images/c78a54bbfab03ddb11e6411cc2c13c80b160c154.gif)

Dynamic Lights + Realistic HUD

![Dynamic Lights + Blood HUD GIF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nVED8Vzq/images/c839b8da2295e13776b8e0d8ada8a875a773ea2a.gif)

- Hordes Integration(Default every 5 days, with a delay variation of 2)

And more! Check out the dependencies in the version you download for a full list of included mods.
